title: Notes on Monday.com Mobile App
excerpt:
Hey, 
Does anyone know why I have a notes section on my “More” tab of the Mobile App, but no one else in my team has this option? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Keiren.N (Keiren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
Does anyone know why I have a notes section on my “More” tab of the Mobile App, but no one else in my team has this option?
Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Keiren.N,

This particular feature (otherwise referred to as our Infobox feature) was an iOS feature that we deprecated after software update 4.62. It is expected that some users still have this feature available if they previously used infoboxes in the account or had signed up when the feature was still supported - apologies for any confusion caused here! The team are looking into bringing back notes/mind dump feature in the future, so stay tuned later down the track for updates
